verdict.note: BASELINE no-cache: warm /api/board 5.5s (rebuilds every poll); worst /health under 10x poll storm = 51.5s — server wedged
FIXED single-flight+cache: warm /api/board 0.2s (served from cache), worst /health under 10x poll storm ~1.3s (vs 51.5s baseline), storm triggers ZERO extra builds

Reproduced the permanent wedge on b641e55c (pre-fix): with HANG present the cold build's two git-log children never exit; after rm HANG (git healthy, 0.005s) /api/board answers 503@20s forever (2 probes over 95s, no retry, no rebuild), /api/specs holds the connection open (http=000 at curl's 30s wall), server.log has ZERO warn lines, and the hung children (etime 1:45+) accumulate unkilled. Restart is the only cure — matches /tmp/board-wedge-repro/transcript.md.

Fixed tree (5fdae5f6), same fixture+shim recipe, SPEXCODE_GIT_TIMEOUT_MS=8000 SPEXCODE_BOARD_BUILD_TIMEOUT_MS=5000: wedged cold build was abandoned by the watchdog at 5s (loud 'did not settle' warn), hung git children SIGKILLed at 8s (loud 'killed after' warns), and WITHOUT restart the next /api/board answered 200 in 0.14s, /api/specs 200 in 0.04s, cache hit 200 after that. With an SSE client armed a HEAD move restored full history data (versions 2/1, size 742 == healthy baseline). Every pre-fix failure clause (503 forever, 000 connections, zero logs, unkilled children) closed.
